errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.validation: Please check the form and try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Sign in to pick up where you left off.

signup.title: Start with Asaulia.
signup.subtitleDefault: Create your account and pick a plan on the next step.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click it to finish setting up your account.

request.title: Reset your password.
request.subtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new one.

confirm.title: Choose a new password.
confirm.subtitle: Once saved we'll take you to sign in again.

errors.invalidCredentials: We couldn't sign you in with those credentials. Double-check and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.accountCreationFailed: We couldn't create that account. Try a different email.
errors.invalidInvitation: This invitation is no longer valid.
errors.validation: Please check the form and try again.
errors.resetTooManyRequests: Too many reset requests. Try again later.
errors.resetInfo: If that email has an account, we sent a reset link.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.resetFailed: Could not update your password. Try requesting a new link.

brand.title: Tell us about your brand.
brand.subtitle: Only the essentials. You can edit everything later.

plan.title: Choose your split.
plan.subtitle: Slide between a lean fixed base and a higher fixed fee with a smaller cut of sales.

slider.expectedSalesAria: Expected monthly attributed sales in US dollars

payment.title: Set up billing.
payment.subtitle: We charge the fixed portion monthly; variable is reconciled at the close of each cycle.
payment.cancelledInfo: Payment was cancelled. Try again when you're ready.
payment.stripeInfo: You'll be redirected to Stripe to save a card. No charge until your first billing cycle closes.

complete.title: You're in.
complete.subtitle: Taking you to your dashboard now.

errors.invalidInput: Please check the brand fields and try again.
errors.slugTaken: We couldn't reserve that brand name. Try a different one.
errors.invalidPlan: That plan is not valid. Try sliding again.
errors.planMismatch: The fixed and variable portions do not match. Please try again.
errors.stripeFailed: Stripe did not return a checkout URL.
errors.paymentPending: Payment was cancelled. Try again when you're ready.
errors.noBrand: Start with the brand setup step first.
errors.noBrandRestart: Restart onboarding to set up billing.
errors.brandNotFound: We lost track of your brand. Please restart onboarding.
errors.noPlan: Pick a plan before setting up payment.
